zh.lifeSummary: 當Everard Fielding於1440年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir William de Fielding-8歲，母親Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding10歲。他於1474年與Giliane Ellis在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1514年在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Everard Fielding于1440年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir William de Fielding-8岁，母亲Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding10岁。他于1474年与Giliane Ellis在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1514年在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Fielding
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occasionally from a Middle English survival of Old English felding ‘dweller in the field(s), open country’.
Irish: possibly a variant of McField (see McPhail ).

variants.name: Fielden
meanings: English: from a Middle English survival of the dative plural of Old English feld, denoting someone who lived ‘in the fields’. The lost district name Feldon in Warwickshire may be named with this word. Perhaps also a habitational name from Feldom in Marske, North Yorkshire, recorded as Feldon in 1231. See Field .

nameMeanings.name: Everard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from eofor ‘boar’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was reinforced at the time of the Norman Conquest by a Continental Germanic form introduced to Britain by the Normans. The modern given name may be a transferred use of the surname, but it was in regular use in the Digby family of Rutland from the 15th to the 17th centuries, probably as a survival of the Norman name. It alternated in this family with Kenelm .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Everard Fielding was born in 1440, in England, his father, Sir William de Fielding, was -8 and his mother, Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding, was 10. He married Giliane Ellis in 1474, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1514, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Everard Fielding est né en 1440, à Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Fielding, avait -8 ans et sa mère, Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Giliane Ellis en 1474, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1514, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Everard Fielding 1440 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Fielding -8 und seine Mutter Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding 10. Er hat 1474 in England Giliane Ellis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1514 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Everard Fieldingが1440年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir William de Fieldingは-8歳，母Agnes De St Liz Aka Fieldingは10歳であった。1474年にイギリスでGiliane Ellisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1514年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Everard Fielding(이)가 1440년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Fielding(은)는 -8세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1474년 영국에서 Giliane Ellis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1514년 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Everard Fielding родился в 1440 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Fielding было -8 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes De St Liz Aka Fielding, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Giliane Ellis в 1474 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1514 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
